inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar aur thakaan mehsoos kar raha hoon

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Bukhar aur thakaan ke lakshan viral fever ke liye vishisht hain

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Dry cough ki sankhya kam hai, isliye bronchitis sambhav hai lekin abhi tak spasht nahin hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Abhi tak koi vishisht lakshan nahin hain jo tuberculosis ki or ishara karte hain

inputs.text: Mujhe khansi ho rahi hai aur yeh sukh khansi hai, koi balgam nahin hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Sukh khansi bronchitis ka lakshan ho sakta hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever abhi bhi sambhav hai, lekin khansi ka lakshan viral fever se alag hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Abhi tak koi vishisht lakshan nahin hain jo tuberculosis ki or ishara karte hain

inputs.text: Mujhe raat ko pasina aata hai, wazan bhi kam ho raha hai aur khansi 2 hafte se zyada ho gayi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Raat ko pasina, wazan kam hona aur 2 hafte se zyada khansi tuberculosis ke vishisht lakshan hain

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Bronchitis mein aise lakshan nahin hote

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Pneumonia mein bhi kuch alag lakshan hote hain, jaise balgam ya saans lene mein dikkat

inputs.text: Mujhe ab bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai aur khansi mein kabhi-kabhi thoda balgam bhi aata hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Tuberculosis ki pushti ho gayi hai, kamzori aur balgam ke lakshan bhi iske saath hain

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, kyunki tuberculosis ki pushti ho gayi hai

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, kyunki tuberculosis ki pushti ho gayi hai
